heading: Length of service for promotion purposes
label: 3025 Length of service for promotion purposes
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853f of this titlePub. L. 107–372

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Each officer shall be assumed to have, for promotion purposes, at least the same length of service as any other officer below that officer on the lineal list.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), an officer who has lost numbers shall be assumed to have, for promotion purposes, no greater service than the officer next above such officer in such officer’s new position on the lineal list.
